title: Implement WebBluetooth API for browser-based BLE mesh fallback
body: Allow the React frontend to act as a mesh relay when native Rust backend is unavailable.
label: enhancement

title: Service Worker failing to cache WASM assets offline
body: The vite-plugin-pwa is sometimes failing to cache the WASM engine module, breaking offline capability on first load.
label: bug

title: Add dark/light theme toggle in Captive Portal UI
body: User preference should be saved in localStorage.
label: enhancement

title: Chessboard: Support premoves for high-latency LoRa links
body: Allow players to queue up a move before the opponent's packet arrives.
label: feature

title: Handle Network disconnect gracefully in UI
body: If the local daemon stops running, the React UI should show a toast notification instead of silent fetch failures.
label: bug

title: Compress FEN strings before transmitting over LoRa
body: Raw FEN strings are too long for a single LoRa packet. We should encode them efficiently.
label: enhancement

title: Render 3D pieces option in Chessboard component
body: Use Three.js to render 3D pieces if the device is powerful enough.
label: feature

title: Internationalization (i18n) for Captive Portal
body: Support Spanish, French, and German translations for the portal landing page.
label: enhancement

title: Fix layout shift when NetworkVisualizer mounts
body: The network visualizer canvas causes a CLS penalty on initial render.
label: bug

title: Add sound effects for moves and checkmate
body: Play lightweight WebAudio beeps when a piece is moved or the game ends.
label: enhancement

title: Optimize Kademlia bucket refresh rate for battery savings
body: Current ping interval is too aggressive for mobile nodes.
label: enhancement

title: Implement STUN-less UDP hole punching fallback
body: If the primary technique fails, fallback to standard UDP hole punching.
label: feature

title: BLE Mesh MTU size mismatch causing packet drops
body: Certain Android devices drop BLE packets larger than 20 bytes when acting as relays.
label: bug

title: Simulate network partitions in integration tests
body: We need a test suite that splits the DHT into two islands and ensures they merge when reconnected.
label: enhancement

title: Add Reticulum physical layer backend
body: Interface with RNode hardware directly via serial port in the rust daemon.
label: feature

title: Implement packet deduplication cache
body: Flood-fill routing in dense areas is causing nodes to process the same move packet multiple times.
label: bug

title: Encrypt LoRa payloads with AES-GCM
body: Ensure move data and DHT lookups cannot be spoofed by replay attacks.
label: security

title: Expose RSSI metrics to the frontend visualizer
body: Send signal strength data to the React UI for drawing link quality.
label: enhancement

title: Fix node ID collision handling
body: Rare edge case where two nodes generate the same ID. Need a deterministic resolution.
label: bug

title: Implement Wi-Fi Direct Group Owner rotation
body: Rotate the AP role among devices to spread battery drain.
label: feature

title: Merkle-Patricia Trie state root calculation is slow
body: Hashing the trie takes too long on ARM devices. Need to optimize the Keccak routines.
label: enhancement

title: YATA CRDT merge conflict during simultaneous moves
body: When two islands play diverging moves, the CRDT doesn't cleanly resolve the illegal board state.
label: bug

title: Implement DAG-CBOR serialization for ledger blocks
body: Replace JSON serialization in the consensus layer with DAG-CBOR for compactness.
label: feature

title: Add Nova-SNARK folding verifier logic
body: Need to verify zero-knowledge proofs of execution on the edge nodes.
label: enhancement

title: Enforce 10 MB active ledger cap strictly
body: We are occasionally spilling over to 11MB before the garbage collector prunes old branches.
label: bug

title: Create a genesis block configuration file format
body: Allow defining custom network starts via a YAML or TOML genesis file.
label: feature

title: Implement Light Client sync mode
body: Allow mobile devices to verify state roots without downloading the full trie.
label: enhancement

title: Fix out-of-memory panic during deep trie traversal
body: Recursive trie traversal can blow the stack. Rewrite as iterative.
label: bug

title: Add transaction fee logic for Sybil prevention
body: Require burning local credits to submit non-game transactions.
label: security

title: Write fuzz tests for CRDT merge logic
body: Use cargo-fuzz to find edge cases in the YATA implementations.
label: enhancement

title: Sandbox WAMR memory pool exhaustion
body: The fixed memory pool in host.rs gets exhausted after 100 sequential jobs.
label: bug

title: Pre-compile engine.wasm into a static array
body: Use include_bytes! to embed the engine directly into the daemon binary for faster cold starts.
label: enhancement

title: Implement AI Quantization for local opponent
body: Allow playing against an INT8 quantized neural network directly inside WAMR.
label: feature

title: VDF gate taking too long on older Androids
body: MinRoot sequential VDF takes >20 mins on old phones. Needs recalibration.
label: bug

title: Expose engine evaluation score to frontend
body: Return the centipawn score from the WAMR sandbox to the React UI.
label: enhancement

title: Add WebAssembly time limit enforcement
body: Terminate sandbox execution if a job runs longer than 5 seconds.
label: security

title: Support importing custom Syzygy tablebases in sandbox
body: Allow users to load local tablebase files via the filesystem WASI interface.
label: feature

title: Fix shakmaty Castling logic bug in WASM
body: Rare castling bug where the rook doesn't move when evaluated inside the WAMR target.
label: bug

title: Optimize bitboard operations for WASM target
body: Enable WASM SIMD instructions if available in WAMR.
label: enhancement

title: Implement job priority queues
body: Prioritize human moves over AI evaluation jobs in the sandbox queue.
label: feature

title: TWAMM max-spread threshold not respected on volatile pairs
body: The 2% max spread cap is occasionally exceeded due to stale mid-price oracle.
label: bug

title: Add OpenAPI schema generation
body: Use utoipa to generate Swagger/OpenAPI docs for the interop API.
label: enhancement

title: Implement HTLC refund logic on timeout
body: Escrowed credits are currently lost forever if the preimage is not revealed.
label: bug

title: Add multi-sig governance voting endpoints
body: Allow offline nodes to cast ZK-blinded votes on network parameters.
label: feature

title: Retroactive airdrop for genesis nodes failing to claim
body: The `/api/v1/liquidity` endpoint throws 400 Bad Request on valid claims.
label: bug

title: Rate limit Axum HTTP endpoints
body: Add tower-governor to prevent local spam on the interop server.
label: security

title: Bridge liquidity UI in frontend
body: Add a React component for users to view and interact with the TWAMM.
label: feature

title: Optimize JSON serialization overhead in interop
body: serde_json is taking up too much CPU time for large responses.
label: enhancement

title: Add Web-of-Trust vouching system
body: Allow nodes to cryptographically vouch for peers to increase their trust score.
label: feature

title: Fix WebSocket connection leak
body: Connections are not dropped properly when the peer disconnects abruptly.
label: bug
